expertise.rationale: Indigo-to-cyan architecture spectrum: indigo anchors authority and structural rigor; cyan accents indicate clarity.
Emerald-to-gold economic spectrum: emerald denotes value flow; gold highlights pricing signals.
Slate-to-amber compliance spectrum: slate communicates neutrality; amber signals checkpoints.

spectrum.rationale: Amethyst-to-parchment historical spectrum: amethyst conveys synthesis depth; parchment evokes archives.

roles.description: Clean blueprint-line edges with internal grid subdivisions.
Forward-pointing equilateral triangle with a precise central notch.
Octagon with a centred ring motif for inspection.
Circle containing a subtle spiral/arc band (chronicle coil).
